app.name: GoLocalChina
app.subtitle: Connect with passionate local guides who show you the real China — beyond the tourist trail.
app.platform_notice: GoLocalChina is an information service platform. We connect you with local guides — we do not organize tours.

search.title: Find Your Local Guide
search.no_results: No guides found. Try different filters.

guide.connect_note: You are requesting to connect with a local guide. GoLocalChina facilitates this connection but is not a party to the service agreement between you and the guide.

how.title: How GoLocalChina Works
how.subtitle: Three simple steps to your authentic China experience
how.step1_desc: Search guides by city, language, and specialty. Read reviews from real travelers. Every certified guide's license is verified.
how.step2_desc: Send a connection request. Chat with your guide to plan the perfect day — they know the hidden gems, the best food, and the stories behind every corner.
how.step3_desc: Meet your guide in person. Pay them directly — cash, Alipay, or WeChat Pay. No middleman, no platform fees. Just you and a local who loves their city.

payment.direct_desc: Payment is arranged directly between you and the guide.
payment.note: No platform fees. Pay your guide directly when you meet.
